remixRunSummary.strategySummary: TSV由来のsource-product-indexを主材料にし、ハッカソン由来の小さな価値構造を現在の生活・教育・クリエイター系トピックへ移した。TradingAgentsはGitHub高注目枠として使うが、投資判断や売買UIはコピーせず、複数役割のレビュー構造だけを転用した。
risksForConceptStrategist: 防災系は公式助言に見せず、家庭内の準備整理・不足可視化に止める。
学校連絡系は公式文書を改変せず、原文参照と不明点を残す。
TradingAgents転用は投資・売買・金融メタファーを外し、複数視点レビューだけを使う。

rawIdeaMutations.rawDirection: 学校や自治体のお知らせを、家庭ごとの提出物・期限・確認先の行動ルートに変える。
rawIdeaMutations.whatChangedFromSource: ADU許認可の専門ワークフローを、保護者向けのお知らせ理解に移した。
rawIdeaMutations.whyItMightBeInteresting: 読んだだけでは動けない文書を、家族が今日やることへ変換できる。
rawIdeaMutations.riskOrBoringFailure: 単なる要約になると弱い。期限・誰がやるか・不明点まで分ける必要がある。

rawIdeaMutations.rawDirection: 家庭状況や地域のお知らせを、優先度つきの防災準備カードに変える。
rawIdeaMutations.whatChangedFromSource: 道路映像から公共投資順位を出す構造を、家庭の準備不足の優先順位づけへ移した。
rawIdeaMutations.whyItMightBeInteresting: 漠然とした防災を、足りない順に見える小さなカードへ変えられる。
rawIdeaMutations.riskOrBoringFailure: 公式避難判断に踏み込むと危険。家庭内準備の整理に限定する。

rawIdeaMutations.rawDirection: 公開前の投稿・動画企画を、複数AIレビュワーが反対意見つきで審査する。
rawIdeaMutations.whatChangedFromSource: 投資判断の専門チーム構造を、公開前の弱点発見・読者目線レビューへ反転した。
rawIdeaMutations.whyItMightBeInteresting: AIで作ったものをそのまま出す不安に対して、賛成・反対・リスク・改善案が見える。
rawIdeaMutations.riskOrBoringFailure: 抽象的なAI会議に見えると弱い。出す/直す/保留の判断メモに落とす必要がある。

rawIdeaMutations.rawDirection: 面談や学校説明会の後に、保護者向けの理解メモと次の確認事項を作る。
rawIdeaMutations.whatChangedFromSource: 医療面談後の専門用語説明を、学校・自治体・保護者連絡の後工程へ移した。
rawIdeaMutations.whyItMightBeInteresting: 話を聞いた後に何を確認し、何を家庭でやるかが曖昧な場面に刺さる。
rawIdeaMutations.riskOrBoringFailure: 学校の公式判断を代替すると危険。質問リストと理解整理に限定する。

rawIdeaMutations.rawDirection: 家庭の人数・在庫・制約を入れると、備蓄や準備タスクの配分計画を出す。
rawIdeaMutations.whatChangedFromSource: 鉄道運用の制約最適化を、家庭内の備蓄・役割分担・準備順序へ小さくした。
rawIdeaMutations.whyItMightBeInteresting: 家族ごとに違う制約を、表やカードで見える計画にできる。
rawIdeaMutations.riskOrBoringFailure: 真面目すぎて普通のチェックリストに見える。見える化の面白さが必要。

evaluatedRemixes.newTheme: 学校・保護者のお知らせ理解
evaluatedRemixes.remixTitle: 学校お知らせ行動ルート
evaluatedRemixes.whatWasTransferred: 専門的で手順が見えにくい文書を、利用者ごとの具体的な行動フローに変える構造。
evaluatedRemixes.whatWasChanged: 許認可手続きから、家庭が読む学校・自治体のお知らせに移した。出力は手続きフローではなく、期限・担当・確認先つきの行動ルートにする。
evaluatedRemixes.topicApplied: 学校・保護者のお知らせ理解
evaluatedRemixes.whyThisMayWork: 非エンジニアにも価値が直感的で、AIが文書を読むだけでなく家庭の行動に変える点が見える。
evaluatedRemixes.broadAudienceHook: 長いお知らせを読む負担が減り、今日何をすればいいか分かる。
evaluatedRemixes.aiNativeHook: 文書理解、タスク抽出、期限抽出、家庭文脈への変換というAIらしい処理が見える。
visibleInteractionPossibilities: 原文の重要箇所ハイライト
提出物・期限・確認先カード
不明点だけを質問リスト化
evaluatedRemixes.antiCloneBoundary: ADU許認可や法務手続きはコピーしない。学校連絡の読み替え支援に限定する。
reviewerNotes: 生活者向けで分かりやすい。
単なる要約ではなく、家庭内の行動ルートにする点が重要。
iterationNotes: 初期案の『お知らせ要約』から、担当・期限・不明点に分解する行動ルートへ修正した。

evaluatedRemixes.remixTitle: 家庭防災の優先カード

evaluatedRemixes.ideaMoveApplied: Put To Other Use + Output Form Shift
evaluatedRemixes.topicApplied: 家庭と地域の防災準備
evaluatedRemixes.whyThisMayWork: 防災は情報が多く行動に落ちにくいので、優先順位と理由が見えるカードは使いやすい。
evaluatedRemixes.broadAudienceHook: 家族ごとに足りない準備が上から順に分かる。
evaluatedRemixes.aiNativeHook: 制約や状況から不足を推定し、説明つきで優先順位を出す点がAIらしい。
visibleInteractionPossibilities: 不足カードのランキング
公式情報への参照欄
今週やること/買うもの/確認することの3列表示
evaluatedRemixes.antiCloneBoundary: 道路映像やインフラ投資判断はコピーしない。公式避難判断の代替にしない。
reviewerNotes: 生活テーマとして強いが、安全境界が必要。
公式情報へのリンクと不確実性表示を必須にしたい。
iterationNotes: 避難アドバイスではなく、家庭内準備の不足可視化へ範囲を狭めた。

evaluatedRemixes.newTheme: 個人クリエイターの公開前チェック
evaluatedRemixes.remixTitle: 公開前レビュー委員会
evaluatedRemixes.whatWasTransferred: 複数の専門役割が同じ対象を見て、賛成・反対・リスク・最終判断を出す構造。
evaluatedRemixes.whatWasChanged: 売買判断から、動画・投稿・LP・ニュースレターの公開前レビューへ移した。
evaluatedRemixes.topicApplied: 個人クリエイターの公開前チェック
evaluatedRemixes.whyThisMayWork: AI生成物を出す前の不安に対し、反対意見や弱点が見えるため判断材料になる。
evaluatedRemixes.broadAudienceHook: 投稿を出す前に、読者に伝わるか、炎上や弱点がないかを見られる。
evaluatedRemixes.aiNativeHook: 複数AIロールの議論・リスクレビュー・最終メモという構造がAI好きにも分かりやすい。
visibleInteractionPossibilities: 賛成レビュワー/反対レビュワー/リスク係/編集長の4列

evaluatedRemixes.antiCloneBoundary: 投資、株、売買、金融分析、TradingAgentsの役割名はコピーしない。
reviewerNotes: AI/クリエイター層に刺さりやすい。
抽象的な会議ではなく、公開判断メモに落とすと強い。
iterationNotes: 『AI会議』から、公開前の出す/直す/保留判断へ具体化した。

evaluatedRemixes.whatWasTransferred: 専門家とのやりとりの後に、利用者が理解し行動できる形へ変換する構造。

evaluatedRemixes.whyThisMayWork: 面談後は理解したつもりでも、家庭で何を確認すべきかが曖昧になりやすい。

rejectedInterestingRemixes.reasonRejected: 家庭防災の優先カード案と近く、こちらは普通のチェックリスト/在庫表に寄りやすい。
rejectedInterestingRemixes.whyStillInteresting: 制約から計画を出す構造は、将来的に家族の準備や役割分担に使える。
rejectedInterestingRemixes.whatWouldMakeItStronger: ゲーム性やシミュレーション性を足し、単なる表から脱却する。

productSourceIndex.purpose: Persistent index of small rising products, hackathon projects, GitHub projects, and product-gallery launches used as idea source material for Prodia.

updatePolicy.dedupeKey: productUrl first, codeUrl second, then sourceUrl + normalized name + source category
addWhen: The source is a recent hackathon winner/finalist/demo, recently rising GitHub project, or small product-gallery launch.
The product has a clear input-output transformation, interaction pattern, or value mechanism.
The product is not an established major product.
updateWhen: The same product appears again with stronger evidence, a new source, new traction, public code, or clearer value knowledge.
The product's category, URL, target user, evidence, or value frame becomes more precise.
excludeWhen: The item is an established major product rather than a small rising product.
The item is only a broad platform, framework, or directory listing with no product-shaped demo.
The item duplicates an existing canonical entry without adding evidence.

entries.name: CrossBeam
entries.concept: A narrow AI workflow product for streamlining California accessory dwelling unit permitting.
entries.oneLineDescription: Streamlines the California accessory dwelling unit permitting process.
entries.problemSolved: Domain-specific permitting is confusing, document-heavy, and hard for non-specialists to navigate.
entries.targetUser: homeowners, lawyers, permit consultants, civic operators
entries.userFriction: Users need to translate regulation and paperwork into a sequence of concrete permit steps.
entries.coreUserInput: Property/project context, local permit requirements, and ADU planning details.
entries.coreOutput: A guided permitting workflow or action plan.
entries.coreMechanism: Transforms a bureaucratic domain workflow into guided steps using domain-specific rules and AI generation.
entries.interactionPattern: User enters a concrete permit situation and receives a guided workflow.
entries.whyItIsInteresting: A domain expert used AI coding to turn a painful regulatory workflow into software.
entries.whyItGotAttention: It shows non-engineer domain expertise becoming a focused product through AI-assisted building.
entries.noveltyKernel: Expert bureaucratic know-how becomes a narrow guided product instead of a generic assistant.
entries.transferableStructure: Turn a specialized paperwork/regulation process into a guided action workflow.
entries.cloneRisk: Copying the ADU permitting domain, name, jurisdictional claims, or legal workflow too directly.
entries.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy the ADU permitting domain or imply legal advice.
adoptionOrAttentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon winner/example in local seed dataset
attentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon winner/example in local seed dataset
entries.reasonIncluded: Small hackathon product with a concrete domain-pain-to-workflow mechanism.
entries.reasonNotMajorProduct: Not an established commercial platform; included as a hackathon product seed.

discoverySources.storedEvidenceSummary: A lawyer used AI coding tools to turn ADU permitting friction into a product.

entries.name: Generative AI band
entries.concept: Uses generative AI to create or operate a band-like music experience.
entries.oneLineDescription: Turns creative direction into a multi-part AI-generated performance.
entries.problemSolved: A solo creator may want the feeling of directing a full creative group without having one.
entries.userFriction: Creative output often needs multiple coordinated roles, not just a single generated asset.
entries.coreUserInput: Creative intent, theme, mood, or performance direction.
entries.coreMechanism: AI splits creative intent into multiple coordinated performer-like parts.
entries.interactionPattern: User directs a creative system and sees an expressive artifact come back.
entries.whyItIsInteresting: It frames AI as a creative collaborator group rather than a productivity assistant.
entries.whyItGotAttention: It is playful, immediately demoable, and visibly different from ordinary work tools.
entries.noveltyKernel: A user directs an AI ensemble, not a single generator.
entries.transferableStructure: Turn one creative brief into coordinated multi-role output.
entries.ideaKernel: Single intent to multi-role creative ensemble
entries.cloneRisk: Copying the band/music framing too directly.
entries.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy the band/music premise; transfer the multi-role creative ensemble structure.
adoptionOrAttentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon example in local seed dataset
attentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon example in local seed dataset
entries.reasonIncluded: Playful multi-role output pattern, useful for non-work concepts.
entries.reasonNotMajorProduct: Hackathon-scale creative demo, not an established music product.

discoverySources.storedEvidenceSummary: Creative AI hackathon example using a band-like generated experience.

entries.name: PostVisit.ai
entries.concept: Explains diagnosis and treatment plans to patients after a medical appointment.
entries.oneLineDescription: Turns post-appointment medical information into patient-facing explanations.
entries.problemSolved: Patients leave appointments with complex medical language they may not understand or remember.
entries.userFriction: Expert language and care instructions are difficult to turn into confident next actions.
entries.coreUserInput: Diagnosis, treatment plan, visit notes, patient questions, or aftercare instructions.
entries.coreMechanism: Transforms expert language into novice-facing explanation and guidance.
entries.interactionPattern: User receives a personalized explanation path after an expert interaction.
entries.whyItIsInteresting: A doctor built around a communication gap he understood personally.
entries.whyItGotAttention: It makes expert-to-novice translation visible in a high-friction, emotionally important moment.
entries.noveltyKernel: The product moment starts after the expert meeting, when the user is most confused.
entries.transferableStructure: Convert expert language into personalized after-action understanding.
entries.cloneRisk: Copying medical domain claims or giving unsafe medical advice.
entries.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy medical diagnosis/treatment guidance; transfer the after-event explanation structure.
adoptionOrAttentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon winner/example in local seed dataset
attentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon winner/example in local seed dataset
entries.reasonIncluded: Strong expert-to-novice translation pattern with clear user friction.
entries.reasonNotMajorProduct: Hackathon-scale product seed, not a mature platform.

discoverySources.storedEvidenceSummary: Doctor-built hackathon product for explaining post-visit diagnosis and treatment information.

entries.name: Rake Optimization Suite decision support
entries.concept: AI decision support for smart railway rake planning.
entries.oneLineDescription: Uses AI decision support for smart railway rake planning.
entries.problemSolved: Operational teams must optimize constrained logistics decisions under many variables.
entries.userFriction: Planning requires comparing constraints, assets, timing, and tradeoffs quickly.
entries.coreUserInput: Operational constraints, assets, routes, timing, and planning goals.
entries.coreMechanism: Turns operational constraints into a ranked decision support plan.
entries.interactionPattern: User enters constraints and compares recommended plans/scores.
entries.whyItIsInteresting: Concrete operational constraints become a measurable plan rather than a vague recommendation.
entries.whyItGotAttention: It applies AI to a specific, measurable planning problem.
entries.noveltyKernel: A narrow operational problem becomes an explainable planning scorecard.
entries.transferableStructure: Translate constraints into ranked operational options.
entries.cloneRisk: Copying railway rake planning or domain-specific operations details.
entries.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy railway logistics domain; transfer constraint-to-plan structure.
adoptionOrAttentionProof: Reported as Smart India Hackathon first-prize coverage in local seed dataset
attentionProof: Reported as Smart India Hackathon first-prize coverage in local seed dataset
entries.reasonIncluded: Strong constrained-planning pattern useful for many non-railway domains.
entries.reasonNotMajorProduct: Hackathon project seed, not a broad logistics platform.

discoverySources.storedEvidenceSummary: AI decision support for smart railway rake planning.

entries.name: Road footage to investment recommendations
entries.concept: Turns road footage into infrastructure investment recommendations.
entries.oneLineDescription: Converts messy road footage into ranked civic investment decisions.
entries.problemSolved: Infrastructure planning needs to turn field evidence into prioritized action.
entries.targetUser: city operators, civic planners, infrastructure teams
entries.userFriction: Raw visual evidence is hard to compare, rank, and translate into funding priorities.
entries.coreUserInput: Road footage or field observation media.
entries.coreMechanism: AI extracts signals from messy visual evidence and converts them into prioritized decisions.
entries.interactionPattern: User provides evidence and receives ranked actions with rationale.
entries.whyItIsInteresting: Messy real-world observations become concrete civic priorities.
entries.whyItGotAttention: It makes AI useful for visible public infrastructure decisions rather than abstract analysis.
entries.noveltyKernel: Field evidence becomes a decision queue.
entries.transferableStructure: Convert messy observation evidence into ranked action priorities.
entries.cloneRisk: Copying the road footage/infrastructure funding domain too directly.
entries.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy road investment workflow; transfer evidence-to-priority structure.
adoptionOrAttentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon winner/example in local seed dataset
attentionProof: Reported as an Anthropic hackathon winner/example in local seed dataset
entries.reasonIncluded: Clear messy-input-to-ranked-action mechanism that can transfer widely.
entries.reasonNotMajorProduct: Hackathon-scale product seed with a specific civic workflow.

discoverySources.storedEvidenceSummary: Hackathon product turns road footage into infrastructure investment recommendations.

entries.name: TradingAgents
entries.concept: A multi-agent framework that turns market analysis into a specialist team workflow.
entries.oneLineDescription: A multi-agent framework that turns market analysis into a specialist team workflow.
entries.problemSolved: A multi-agent framework that turns market analysis into a specialist team workflow.
entries.userFriction: It makes multi-agent reasoning tangible by mapping AI roles to a familiar high-stakes organization.
entries.coreUserInput: Ticker, market data, news, fundamentals, and trading context.
entries.coreOutput: Role-based analysis, debate, risk review, and a synthesized trading decision/report.
entries.outputArtifact: Role-based analysis, debate, risk review, and a synthesized trading decision/report.
entries.coreMechanism: Multiple specialist agents analyze the same target from different roles, debate or contrast viewpoints, then synthesize a decision with risk context.
entries.interactionPattern: A user follows an AI organization: analysts produce views, risk roles critique them, and a manager/trader synthesizes the result.
entries.whyItIsInteresting: It makes multi-agent reasoning tangible by mapping AI roles to a familiar high-stakes organization.
entries.whyItGotAttention: It makes multi-agent reasoning tangible by mapping AI roles to a familiar high-stakes organization.
entries.noveltyKernel: It makes multi-agent reasoning tangible by mapping AI roles to a familiar high-stakes organization.
entries.transferableStructure: Uncertain judgment becomes a visible specialist team: role decomposition, disagreement, evidence/risk review, and final synthesis.
entries.ideaKernel: Uncertain judgment becomes a visible specialist team: role decomposition, disagreement, evidence/risk review, and final synthesis.
entries.cloneRisk: Copying trading analysis, investment advice, role names, market data workflow, or a stock-decision UI would be too close.
entries.antiCloneBoundary: Copying trading analysis, investment advice, role names, market data workflow, or a stock-decision UI would be too close.
adoptionOrAttentionProof: Clear multi-agent architecture that is easy to explain and remix
attentionProof: Clear multi-agent architecture that is easy to explain and remix

discoverySources.storedEvidenceSummary: A multi-agent framework that turns market analysis into a specialist team workflow.

valueKnowledgeCards.whatIsValuable: A complex expert process becomes a narrow guided product.
valueKnowledgeCards.whyPeopleReact: The value is obvious because the before state is painful paperwork and the after state is a concrete workflow.
valueKnowledgeCards.underlyingMechanism: Expert rules and context are converted into an action sequence.
valueKnowledgeCards.transferableRule: Find another paperwork-heavy domain and turn it into a guided path.
valueKnowledgeCards.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy ADU permitting or legal advice claims.

valueKnowledgeCards.whatIsValuable: The product starts when the user leaves an expert interaction confused.
valueKnowledgeCards.whyPeopleReact: It solves a common gap between expert language and user action.
valueKnowledgeCards.underlyingMechanism: Expert output is rewritten as personalized novice-facing explanation.
valueKnowledgeCards.transferableRule: Move the after-event explainer pattern to any domain where experts talk past users.
valueKnowledgeCards.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy medical advice or diagnosis use cases.

valueKnowledgeCards.whatIsValuable: Unstructured field evidence becomes a prioritized decision list.
valueKnowledgeCards.whyPeopleReact: The transformation from messy footage to ranked civic action is concrete and demoable.
valueKnowledgeCards.underlyingMechanism: AI extracts observable signals and maps them to action priorities.
valueKnowledgeCards.transferableRule: Use messy observations as input, then output a ranked action queue.
valueKnowledgeCards.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy road investment or infrastructure-funding claims.

valueKnowledgeCards.whatIsValuable: Many operational constraints are converted into a comparable plan.
valueKnowledgeCards.whyPeopleReact: It makes an invisible planning problem measurable and actionable.
valueKnowledgeCards.transferableRule: Take a constrained planning problem and output ranked options with reasons.
valueKnowledgeCards.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy railway planning or logistics-specific claims.

valueKnowledgeCards.valueName: Single intent becomes multi-role creative output
valueKnowledgeCards.whatIsValuable: A user's prompt becomes a coordinated ensemble rather than one generated asset.
valueKnowledgeCards.whyPeopleReact: The output is playful, visible, and easier to understand than a generic creative assistant.
valueKnowledgeCards.underlyingMechanism: Creative intent is split into multiple coordinated roles.
valueKnowledgeCards.transferableRule: Turn a single brief into a team-like or ensemble-like generated artifact.
valueKnowledgeCards.antiCloneBoundary: Do not copy music or band framing directly.

maintenanceNotes: TSV files under data/product-research/index-tables are the human-editable source of truth.
source-product-index.json is generated for LLM pipeline consumption. Do not hand-edit it directly.
List-valued TSV cells use ` | ` as the delimiter.

currentTopicRadar.purpose: Daily topic radar for pairing with product-source-index value cores. This is a local validation sample, not live research.

topicCards.title: 家庭と地域の防災準備
topicCards.summary: 災害・猛暑・停電・避難など、家庭ごとに準備すべき行動を具体化する需要がある。
topicCards.whyHotNow: 季節性と公共性があり、生活者が自分ごと化しやすい。
topicCards.userFrictionOrDesire: 一般的な防災情報は多いが、自分の家庭や地域に合わせた行動に落としにくい。
topicCards.remixUse: Source product cores that turn messy information into action cards, ranked plans, or printable packs can transfer well.
riskNotes: Do not present as official emergency advice.
Show missing information and source uncertainty.

topicCards.title: 学校・保護者のお知らせ理解
topicCards.summary: 学校や自治体からの長いお知らせを、家庭ごとの行動や確認事項に変える需要がある。
topicCards.whyHotNow: 教育・家庭・地域の接点にあり、非エンジニアにも価値が伝わりやすい。
topicCards.userFrictionOrDesire: 文章は読めても、いつ何をすればいいか、誰に確認すればいいかが分かりにくい。
topicCards.remixUse: Expert-to-novice explanation, paperwork workflow, and action-card patterns can transfer well.
riskNotes: Keep source snippets and uncertainty visible.

topicCards.title: 個人クリエイターの公開前チェック
topicCards.summary: 動画、投稿、LP、ニュースレターなどを公開する前に、伝わるか、弱点はないかを見たい需要がある。
topicCards.whyHotNow: 個人や小チームの発信量が増え、AIで作ったものをそのまま出す前の判断が課題になっている。
topicCards.userFrictionOrDesire: 作ることは簡単になったが、出す価値があるか、どこが弱いかは判断しにくい。
topicCards.remixUse: Constraint scoring, multi-role creative output, and after-event explanation patterns can become preflight evaluators.
riskNotes: Make critique concrete rather than generic.

coverageGaps: This topic radar is a local validation sample and should be replaced by a real topic-research response before production runs.

ideaMutationFrameworks.purpose: Idea transformation frameworks used by Step2 to mutate indexed product value cores before pairing them with current topics.

frameworks.label: Substitute
frameworks.prompt: Replace the source product's domain, user, input, data, or output with another domain while preserving the value mechanism.
frameworks.useWhen: The source product is strong but its original domain is too narrow or clone-prone.

frameworks.label: Combine
frameworks.prompt: Combine the source product's value mechanism with one current topic or social/technical trend.
frameworks.useWhen: A current topic gives the source product a timely reason to exist.

frameworks.label: Adapt
frameworks.prompt: Apply the source product's interaction pattern to a different audience with similar friction.
frameworks.useWhen: The same friction appears in another user group.

frameworks.label: Modify / Magnify / Minify
frameworks.prompt: Make the source idea smaller, more focused, more playful, more visual, or more one-screen.
frameworks.useWhen: The original project is too broad for Prodia or lacks demo clarity.

frameworks.label: Put To Other Use
frameworks.prompt: Move the same input-output transformation to a different domain or task.
frameworks.useWhen: The mechanism is valuable but the original use case is not the best fit.

frameworks.label: Eliminate
frameworks.prompt: Remove heavy data, accounts, integrations, or broad platform scope until only a small artifact remains.
frameworks.useWhen: The source product is promising but too complex to prototype.

frameworks.label: Reverse / Invert
frameworks.prompt: Invert the product's direction: output to input, expert to novice, risk to prevention, creation to critique, or public to personal.
frameworks.useWhen: A reversed flow creates surprise or a sharper artifact.

frameworks.label: Analogy Transfer
frameworks.prompt: Describe the source product as an analogy, then apply that analogy to a different field.
frameworks.useWhen: The core mechanism is easier to move as a metaphor than as a feature.

frameworks.label: Audience Shift
frameworks.prompt: Move the source product from experts to general users, from individuals to teams, or from adults to students/families.
frameworks.useWhen: The value becomes more surprising when the audience changes.

frameworks.label: Output Form Shift
frameworks.prompt: Change the output into a card, map, simulator, checklist, score, game, route, or printable artifact.
frameworks.useWhen: The source mechanism needs a stronger first-screen demo.

recentArtifacts.title: AIセキュリティレビュー会議ダッシュボード
recentArtifacts.summary: リリース前のセキュリティ論点を複数AIロールで確認する会議型ダッシュボード。
recentArtifacts.weaknessForNextRun: 会議室型に寄りすぎているため、次はユーザーが直接試せるsimulationやevaluatorに寄せたい。

recentArtifacts.title: AI契約レビュー会議室
recentArtifacts.summary: 契約書を複数観点で読むAI会議室。
recentArtifacts.weaknessForNextRun: AIが整理するだけに見えやすく、固有の操作体験が弱い。

avoidRepeating: AIが要約して終わるだけの企画
